message:
fix: HNSW rejects NaN/Infinity vectors and guards heap against NaN distances

- validateVector() in add() and search() fails fast on non-finite values
- heapCmp: NaN-safe sort comparator (NaN sorts last) for all candidate sorts
- searchLayer skips NaN distances as defense-in-depth
- 22 new tests covering distance functions, validation, search, and serialization
